description: A production-ready CRM sales dashboard with mock state and a responsive desktop/mobile layout. Includes a Dashboard (KPI cards for leads, deals, revenue and conversion rate, a pipeline summary by stage, and a recent-activity feed) plus dedicated Pipeline, Leads, and Contacts pages. Adaptive shell (sidebar on desktop, bottom navigation on mobile) with a clean, professional UI.

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready CRM sales dashboard app with:
- mock state
- a responsive layout that adapts between desktop (sidebar navigation) and mobile (bottom navigation)
- a clean, professional UI

Dashboard:
- KPI cards (Total Leads, Active Deals, Revenue This Month, Conversion Rate) with trend indicators
- a Pipeline Summary showing each stage (New Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won) with progress bars
- a Recent Activity feed (deals closed, leads assigned, proposals sent, meetings scheduled)
- a search box and notifications

Navigation:
- Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads and Contacts pages
- adaptive shell: sidebar on desktop, bottom nav bar on mobile

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (leads, deals, activity)
Here's your **Uno CRM** app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a deal details page with navigation
Add a chart to the dashboard

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready CRM sales dashboard app with:
- mock state
- a responsive layout that adapts between desktop (sidebar navigation) and mobile (bottom navigation)
- a clean, professional UI

Dashboard:
- KPI cards (Total Leads, Active Deals, Revenue This Month, Conversion Rate) with trend indicators
- a Pipeline Summary showing each stage (New Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won) with progress bars
- a Recent Activity feed (deals closed, leads assigned, proposals sent, meetings scheduled)
- a search box and notifications

Navigation:
- Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads and Contacts pages
- adaptive shell: sidebar on desktop, bottom nav bar on mobile

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (leads, deals, activity)

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at UnoCRM/UnoCRM.csproj.

**Key files:**
- UnoCRM/App.xaml
- UnoCRM/App.xaml.cs
- UnoCRM/GlobalUsings.cs
- UnoCRM/UnoCRM.csproj
- UnoCRM/MainPage.xaml
- UnoCRM/MainPage.xaml.cs
- UnoCRM/PipelinePage.xaml
- UnoCRM/PipelinePage.xaml.cs
- UnoCRM/LeadsPage.xaml
- UnoCRM/LeadsPage.xaml.cs
- UnoCRM/ContactsPage.xaml
- UnoCRM/ContactsPage.xaml.cs
- UnoCRM/Strings/en/Resources.resw
- UnoCRM/Platforms/Desktop/Program.cs
- UnoCRM/Platforms/WebAssembly/Program.cs

**Structure:**
- MainPage is the Dashboard. It uses a VisualStateManager with an AdaptiveTrigger (MinWindowWidth=900) to switch between a desktop layout (left sidebar navigation) and a mobile layout (bottom navigation bar).
- The Dashboard shows KPI cards (Total Leads, Active Deals, Revenue This Month, Conversion Rate), a Pipeline Summary with per-stage progress bars, and a Recent Activity feed.
- PipelinePage, LeadsPage and ContactsPage are reachable through the sidebar/bottom-nav navigation handlers (NavigateToPipeline_Click, NavigateToLeads_Click, NavigateToContacts_Click).
- All data is mock/seeded directly in the XAML and code-behind. Styling is centralized via Dashboard* resources (brushes and styles) in App.xaml.

The app is built and running. The user may ask me to modify it.
